evidence: standards/enterprise/data-lifecycle.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A temporary offline-bound exception binds exact class, fields, capacity or record limit, maximum age, compensating purge, owner, expiry, and removal plan.
statement: Offline product data MUST be limited to declared purpose and fields, protected according to class, bounded by capacity or record count and maximum age, and purged when purpose, account, authorization, or retention ends.
